source_inputs.label: Methodology Snapshot Registry

required_fields.impact: Frozen snapshot reference is available for the selected packet.
Approval state can gate financial language.

notes: Snapshot metadata is aggregate and methodology-scoped.

upgrade_actions: Keep methodology snapshot ids, approval states, and claim effects attached to each packet.

source_inputs.label: Glean Value Evidence Pack inputs

required_fields.impact: Covered surfaces cannot replace fixture evidence until approved aggregate exports are confirmed.

notes: Real aggregate export fields are not confirmed yet.

blockers: Confirm aggregate Glean export fields for surface, Skill, Agent, and artifact evidence.
upgrade_actions: Request an admin-exported aggregate sample with only approved metadata fields.

source_inputs.label: MCP and action boundary evidence

required_fields.impact: Action-value claims remain not computed without host attribution.

notes: MCP boundary readiness requires approved aggregate activity metadata.

blockers: MCP/action host attribution, scopes, operation class, and activity coverage are not confirmed.
upgrade_actions: Confirm MCP Insights or equivalent aggregate activity export before computing governed action evidence.

source_inputs.label: Customer-safe financial approval workflow

required_fields.impact: Finance approval can support internal-only language.

notes: Approval workflow records claim effect and reviewer role, not person-level performance.

blockers: Finance-approved language is not customer-safe until customer-safe claim effect is approved.
upgrade_actions: Route the selected methodology snapshot for customer-safe financial claim review.

ingestion_path.rationale: Start with admin-exported aggregate uploads so reviewers can validate field contracts and privacy boundaries before live access.
ingestion_path.next_decision: Create a separate source-contract proposal after aggregate fields, approvals, retention, and rollback behavior are confirmed.

governance_boundaries: Real-source readiness does not implement ingestion.
Readiness review does not calculate ROI or upgrade claim readiness.
Only aggregate, metadata-only, account-window evidence may replace synthetic fixtures.

notes: Methodology snapshot metadata is ready for review.
Presented for review but withheld until aggregate export fields are confirmed.
MCP/action evidence is withheld behind host attribution and activity coverage blockers.
Customer-safe financial approval is not present.

governance_boundaries: Aggregate Evidence Import v1 is review only and writes no persistent records.
No raw events, raw content, direct identifiers, rankings, manager views, or productivity scoring.
Accepted aggregate evidence does not upgrade claim readiness.
